<!-- Thank you for contributing! Please fill in each section. -->

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Solution

<!-- What does this change do, and why this approach? -->

## Validation

<!-- Commands you ran and their results. -->

```text
uv run ruff format --check .
uv run ruff check .
uv run mypy .
uv run pytest --cov --cov-branch
uv run python scripts/check_repository.py --full
```

## Screenshots or output

<!-- Optional. Include only if it clarifies the change. No secrets or private data. -->

## Effects

- **Compatibility:** <!-- Any change to supported Python versions or behaviour? -->
- **Security:** <!-- Any security-relevant impact? -->
- **Documentation:** <!-- What documentation did you add or update? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reasonably small.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behaviour changes.
- [ ] All quality checks pass locally.
- [ ] Documentation is in step with the code.
- [ ] The commit messages follow the conventional format.
